content: File created successfully[EDIT_DIFF]--- /workspace/database.py+++ /workspace/database.py@@ -1,25 +1,12 @@-import sqlite3-from contextlib import contextmanager+from sqlalchemy import create_engine+from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base+from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker-DATABASE = 'urls.db'+SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL = "sqlite:///./sql_app.db"-def init_db():-    with get_db() as conn:-        conn.execute('''-            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS urls (-                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,-                original_url TEXT NOT NULL,-                short_code TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,-                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP-            )-        ''')-        conn.commit()+engine = create_engine(+    SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL, connect_args={"check_same_thread": False}+)+SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)-@contextmanager-def get_db():-    conn = sqlite3.connect(DATABASE)-    conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row-    try:-        yield conn-    finally:-        conn.close()+Base = declarative_base()File written: /workspace/database.py (12 lines)
